content.question: How transferable is the Transylvanian minority-language school-bus routing model to domestic Hungarian village consolidation, given differences in funding, ethnic-minority legal status, and administrative jurisdiction?
content.reduction_path: Analyze the operational and financial design of the Transylvanian transport scheme (vehicle deployment, per-kilometer cost, funding source, regulatory framework); compare against pilot data or simulation models of equivalent multi-village routes within a Hungarian school district, with explicit mapping of cost and operational barriers to domestic replication.
